lyrics.text: It's headed for city hall. Mom needs help.
They're out in public again. This is our chance. Follow them. Follow Frozone.
Mom, help me with the boiler.
What do you keep doing? Get out of here. This thing's going to blow. There's no time.
Sorry, but I'm not really supposed to be here. Which seems wrong, doesn't it?
Perhaps you'd be interested in changing that law.
